1.title: airflow_dividend.scheduler.orphaned_tasks.adopted.count
1.query:
timeseries adopted = avg(airflow_dividend.scheduler.orphaned_tasks.adopted),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(adopted) desc
| limit 20
